log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Aarakocra — Armored Escapist's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Lich: IMMUNE to charmed! No effect.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Lich's turn ---
=== ROUND 2 ===
--- Aarakocra — Armored Escapist's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:6+9=15 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Lich's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Finger of Death (Level 7 slot, 0 remaining). DC 20 CON save on Aarakocra — Armored Escapist.
→ Aarakocra — Armored Escapist: CON save [d20:14+3=17 vs DC 20] FAIL! 29 necrotic damage. HP: 30/59
=== ROUND 3 ===
--- Aarakocra — Armored Escapist's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 1 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:15+9=24 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Lich's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 20 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
→ Aarakocra — Armored Escapist: FAIL! 32 fire damage + .
→ 1/1 targets affected.
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 3 rounds ===
